title: Here Is The Bracelet
content:
"Here is the bracelet
        For good little May
        To wear on her arm
        By night and by day.
        When it shines like the sun,
        All's going well;
        But when you are bad,
        A sharp prick will tell.
        Farewell, little girl,
        For now we must part.
        Make a fairy-box, dear,
        Of your own happy heart;
        And take out for all
        Sweet gifts every day,
        Till all the year round
        Is like beautiful May."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Louisa May Alcott delivers a powerful performance in "Here Is The Bracelet"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
